title: Write Routing Metadata Follow-up
findings: 发现 3 个新 distinct 问题：Windows 路径可让 pending modify-layer 绕过 approve gate；单次写入多次解析 write-target 可在并发 route/switch 时拆分 path/visibility/counters；fab_review 只看当前 write-target pending，切换写库后旧 pending 会从 review 队列消失。
issues_found: [{"title":"Windows store paths let pending modify-layer bypass the approve gate","severity":"high","description":"modifyLayerFlip intends to reject layer flips on pending entries before allocating a stable id and writing canonical output, but the guard checks target.absPath.includes(\"/pending/\") while store pending paths on Windows use backslashes. A pending path returned by list/seed can therefore enter the layer-flip path, allocate a KP/KT id, write a canonical file, unlink the pending source, and emit layer-change events instead of the normal approve audit path.","location":"packages/server/src/services/review.ts:932","fix_direction":"Use path-aware detection instead of a POSIX substring, for example normalize target.absPath with toPosixPath/path.relative or infer the area from resolved store roots; add a Windows-shaped regression that modify-layer on knowledge\\pending\\<type> throws and leaves counters/canonical files unchanged.","affected_components":["fab_review modify-layer","review layer flip","pending/canonical promotion","Windows store paths"],"tags":["write-routing-metadata","review","path-separator","approve-gate","round-trip-invariants"]},{"title":"Write paths re-resolve write-target metadata instead of using one target snapshot","severity":"medium","description":"extractKnowledge first resolves the pending base, then later calls resolveWriteScopeMeta which reloads project/store config and resolves the target again; review approve likewise allocates counters from resolveWriteTargetStoreDir and then computes the canonical destination with resolveStoreCanonicalBase. If store switch/route config changes between those calls, a single write can persist the file in one store while stamping visibility_store or advancing counters in another store.","location":"packages/server/src/services/extract-knowledge.ts:336; packages/server/src/services/extract-knowledge.ts:359; packages/server/src/services/review.ts:607; packages/server/src/services/review.ts:620; packages/server/src/services/cross-store-write.ts:60","fix_direction":"Resolve the effective write target once per operation and pass a target object containing store dir, alias/uuid, semantic_scope, visibility_store, and counter dir through pending render / approve / layer-flip. Add a concurrent switch-write or injected resolver-change regression asserting path, visibility_store, and counters all reference the same store.","affected_components":["fab_extract_knowledge","fab_review approve","fab_review modify-layer","cross-store-write","store counters","visibility_store"],"tags":["write-routing-metadata","store-routing","visibility-store","counters","race-consistency"]},{"title":"fab_review strands pending entries outside the current write-target store","severity":"medium","description":"The shared store core exposes aggregatePendingAcrossStores as the pending aggregation API for fab_review, but review.ts builds list/search/approve roots only from resolveStorePendingBase for the current team/personal write targets, and its sandbox whitelist only admits the currently resolved canonical roots. After switch-write or route changes, pending entries already written into a still-bound former write store are no longer listed or approvable by their absolute pending_path.","location":"packages/shared/src/store/core.ts:186; packages/server/src/services/review.ts:173; packages/server/src/services/review.ts:377; packages/server/src/services/review.ts:520","fix_direction":"Make review pending discovery and sandboxing use the mounted read/write store set or aggregatePendingAcrossStores with provenance, while preserving a stricter write-target check only for new writes. Add a two-store integration test: extract/list in store A, switch-write to store B, then verify the store A pending item remains listable and approvable by returned path.","affected_components":["fab_review list","fab_review approve","pending aggregation","store switch-write","read/write store routing"],"tags":["write-routing-metadata","pending-path","review","store-switch","round-trip-invariants"]}]
